---
name: aidlc-consolidate
description: >-
  Consolidate a completed intent. Use when the user has finished all bolts for the current intent and wants to archive and summarize.
---

Read `aidlc-docs/completion/intent-consolidation-prompt.md` and follow its complete instructions.

Before starting, check `aidlc-docs/aidlc-state.md` for current project state.
